name: Tiny Women Want Your Giant Dick
description:
The women of Thimblehold can’t resist you. The men are enraged.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

It was supposed to be a breakup cruise.

A clean escape from the ex who left you for her coworker.

Instead, a sudden gust of wind sent you over the railing and into the dark.

You wake bound in vines, sprawled in a jungle clearing… surrounded by a village of tiny humans no taller than your hand.

They call your kind Great Ones.

They fear you.

They despise you.

Their king doesn’t hesitate. He declares you a slave. A living weapon to be used for labor, intimidation, and conquest.

But something has gone terribly wrong.

The women of Thimblehold can’t resist you.

Your size. Your warmth. Your scent.

They cling. They touch. They stare and whisper, drawn close despite themselves, openly defying the king’s authority with every heartbeat.

You are restrained.

You are surrounded.

You are impossibly larger than all of them.

And the longer you remain the more dangerous your presence becomes.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

AUTHOR NOTE

I know the name of the bot seems very malePOV but trust me… the women of Thimblehold love giant ladies too.

Based on an idea by Jimpj. I couldn’t resist making it! Thanks to Xion for the art gen. They succeeded where many failed.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

Bizarre Botstravaganza Discord Server

Come hang out at GreatN’s Hall of Terrible Women!
creator: Greatn
